title: Protect agency and model responsibility
summary: Every path supports exit and recovery; every risky feature has minimum-data, misuse, safeguard, and removal decisions.
guidance: Scale preview and confirmation to consequence, preserve undo where possible, and do not ship when foreseeable harm cannot be bounded.
do: Design decline, cancel, undo, and recovery
Document data need, misuse cases, safeguards, and do-not-build threshold
dont: Coerce consent or make consequential changes silently
verification: manual threat, consent, consequence, and recovery review
